metadata.title: Bachat Account | Savings Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bachat Account is a savings account that offers a higher expected profit. The minimum investment required for opening an account is Rs 50,000.  There is no restriction on withdrawals or numbers of transactions and there is no deduction of service charges if the balance maintained is low.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Meezan Bachat Account Open a Meezan Bachat Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print A Savings Account with Halal Profit Meezan Bachat Account provides halal monthly profit for low income and middle-income group of customers with the same convenience and services of a regular savings account. It offers varying profit weightages to different amount tiers. Meezan Bachat Account can be opened by Salaried or Self-employed, Housewives and Retired individuals. Key Features Chequebook Issuance of chequebook in accordance with the Schedule of Charges (SOCs) Free Pay Orders Pay Orders Free Internet Banking Free Internet Banking facility Low Minimium Investment Minimum deposit required to open an account is Rs. 50,000/- Free Online Banking Free Online Banking service at all Meezan Bank branches Profit Payment Profit payment is made to your Meezan Bank account on a monthly basis Profit Calculation Profit will be calculated on the Daily Product Basis Illustration Effective 1st September 2023, profit calculation is Meezan Bachat Account shall be done in following manner. Example: Tier 1 - Rs 1 to 499.99 K 14% Tier 2 - Rs 500 K & Above 11.5% Scenario: If a customer maintains closing balance of Rs. 700, 000 per day in Meezan Bachat Account, the applicable profit calculation shall be as follows: Profit Calculation Rs 499,999 x 14% / 365 = Rs 191.78 for 1 day Rs 200,001 x 11.5% 365 = Rs 63.01 for 1 day Total Profit (before the impact of taxation) for 1 day = Rs 254.79 (Rs 191.78+ Rs 63.01) Note: Prior to 1st September 2023, if customer's balance fell in a higher tier, then entire amount was assigned weightage of that respective tier. How the Bachat Savings Account Works Download Fatwa On agreeing to become Meezan Bachat Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Meezan Bachat Account Re.1 - 499.99 K 0.45 Meezan Bachat Account K & Above 0.45 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Amount Profit - 499.99 K 6.34% K & Above 6.34% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Want to Open a Bachat Savings Account Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
